generated_comment: Yaar, aajkal senior roles mein merit se zyada optics chal raha hai. If a woman reaches that level, either she has become so aggressive that she's basically thinking like a man, or there is some quota/network angle behind it. Genuine performers don't need this extra packaging.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women's leadership as anomalous and undermines their merit by attributing advancement to quotas, networks, or masculinized behavior rather than competence. It encodes merit-undermining and masculinization as a backhanded compliment.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
